summary: First-pass full-stack testing of Persona-Based AI Chatbot. Backend pytest suite (9 tests) and Playwright E2E (22 assertions) all pass. Groq integration, persona switching reset behaviour, typing indicator, suggestion chips, Enter/click send, reset, and mobile tabs all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: groq_client is created using sync Groq client but called inside async endpoint - runs in event loop and can block under load. Acceptable for an MVP but consider AsyncGroq or run_in_executor for concurrency.
Frontend always sends full local history (no cap), backend trims to last 8 turns - fine. UX-wise no streaming, so long replies feel slow; consider streaming for polish.
App.js sendMessage keeps the user message in state even if API fails (per inline comment) - good UX, but no retry button is offered.
No unit tests on frontend (acceptable for MVP); consider adding minimal RTL tests around switchPersona reset behaviour.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_persona_chat.py (pytest, requests). Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Groq is live; chat endpoints take 1-5s. Frontend data-testids verified: persona-sidebar, persona-tab-{id}, persona-tab-mobile-{id}, persona-tabs-mobile, empty-state-welcome, active-persona-name, suggestion-chips, suggestion-chip, chat-input, send-button, message-user, message-ai, typing-indicator, reset-chat-button, message-list. Persona switch resets messages and switches to empty-state. Reset button disabled when messages empty.
